name_cn:
Chane1 New 22 Bag is here!!️
Original leather 22 Silver Small: 3260
✨Hot Drop Chane1 22Bag
Whether called a "trash bag" or a "shopping bag"
It just hits the spot 🍃
The one with the year number in its name!
Absolutely the ceiling of classics ✔️
This look is stunning, spacious, and beautiful.
Casual, soft texture, and effortless style.
Hardware: Thick-plated vintage silver buckle
Leather: Original calf leather
Size: 35*37*8 cm
9788025
